title: Remove stale guardrails wording from optimizer prompts

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Renamed the optimizer skill's stale 'Hard Guardrails' section to 'Operating Rules' and verified no guardrails/read-guardrails wording remains in the skill, optimizer YAML, planning-context files, or active creative-run logs.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Follow-up while verifying: the first detached six-cycle optimizer launch failed because the runtime could not find the 'plexus' executable on PATH. Relaunched with /Users/ryan/miniconda3/bin prepended to PATH. New procedures: Appropriate Rebuttal- AI 1557eaf9-5a38-4774-a722-7cc2c761c726 (pid 46742), Early Transfer AI d13a9830-3dcd-41e7-adb4-6a379817bc38 (pid 46743), Project Intent AI e8e7c224-6d1f-49cb-885b-de1974bdeee9 (pid 46744).
